title: AI_OS Packet Adapter Report
description: Foundation schema stub for read-only reports that explain how legacy packet shapes map into the canonical packet contract.

schema.description: Identifies this object as an AI_OS packet adapter report.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this adapter report schema contract.

source_path.description: Legacy packet, fixture, or runtime file inspected by the adapter.

source_dialect.description: Detected source format, such as work_packets_v1, dispatcher_runtime_v1, or dashboard_fixture_v1.

result.description: Adapter result, such as PASS, WARNING, FAIL, or REVIEW_REQUIRED.

warnings.description: Human-readable mapping warnings or missing fields.
